title: NASA's Orion Lands Safely on Two of Three Parachutes in Test - NASA

summaryHistory.summary: 2 min readNASA’s Orion Lands Safely on Two of Three Parachutes in TestNASAJun 06, 2013RELEASE13-048 WASHINGTON – NASA engineers have demonstrated the agency’s Orion spacecraft can land safely if one of its three main parachutes fails to inflate during deployment. 321-867-2468 amber.n.philman@nasa...
